description_for_human: Read and manage the signed-in user's Outlook calendar using Microsoft Graph through a local MCP server with on-behalf-of authentication.

functions.name: ListEvents
functions.description: Retrieve a list of calendar events for the signed-in user with start/end datetime, title, attendees. Use this when the user asks about their schedule, upcoming meetings, or events on a specific date.

functions.name: ListCalendarView
functions.description: Retrieve calendar events in a window with recurring meetings expanded into individual instances. Prefer over ListEvents when showing a day/week view.

functions.name: CreateEvent
functions.description: Create a new calendar event in the signed-in user's Outlook calendar. Supports attendees, Teams online meetings, recurrence, location.

functions.name: UpdateEvent
functions.description: Update an existing calendar event by ID. Can change subject, time, attendees, body, etc.

functions.name: DeleteEventById
functions.description: Delete a calendar event by its ID. Use when the organizer wants to remove an event without notifying attendees.

functions.name: CancelEvent
functions.description: Cancel a calendar event as the organizer and notify all attendees.

functions.name: FindMeetingTimes
functions.description: Suggest available meeting times for the signed-in user and a list of attendees based on free/busy availability.

functions.name: AcceptEvent
functions.description: Accept a calendar event invitation. Optionally include a comment and choose whether to send a response.

functions.name: TentativelyAcceptEvent
functions.description: Tentatively accept a calendar event invitation.

functions.name: WhoAmI
functions.description: Returns the signed-in user's name, UPN, and tenant. Use to verify the OBO + Graph auth chain is working.
